name: Jumana bint Ali
title: Patient Lady
shortDescription: One of the daughters of Amir al-Mu'minin (AS) who was present in the event of Karbala and is considered one of the narrators of the captivity.
fullStory:
Jumana bint Ali ibn Abi Talib is another honored daughter of Imam Ali (AS) whose name is seen among the captives of Karbala in some historical accounts.

Being Imam Hussain's (AS) sister, she could not stay in Medina and leave her brother alone, so she accompanied the Hussaini caravan.

On Ashura, Jumana witnessed the tragedy of losing her brothers, nephews, and the Imam's loyal companions with her own eyes and wept in their mourning.

During her captivity, she was a symbol of the patience and endurance of Hashemite women and played a role in preserving the mission of Ashura alongside her sister Zaynab al-Kubra (AS).
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يا بِنْتَ أَمِيرِ المُؤْمِنِينَ...
quote: (Greeting to the daughters of Amir al-Mu'minin:) Peace be upon you, O daughter of Amir al-Mu'minin...
